_publications._publicationTitle: C-Fiber Loss as a Possible Cause of Neuropathic Pain in Schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: Assessment of the HADS and SCL-90-R questionnaires showed a significantly higher vulnerability for anxiety and depression in the schwannomatosis cohort compared to controls...SCL-90-R depression t(37) = −3.255, p = 0.002, anxiety t(37) = −2.297, p = 0.027
details: Showed significantly higher vulnerability for anxiety and depression in schwannomatosis cohort compared to controls (depression t(37) = −3.255, p = 0.002; anxiety t(37) = −2.297, p = 0.027).
